items.name: OpenBAO
items.description: OpenBao is an identity-based secrets and encryption management system. A secret is anything that you want to tightly control access to, such as API encryption keys, passwords, and certificates. OpenBao provides encryption services that are gated by authentication and authorization methods. Using OpenBao’s UI, CLI, or HTTP API, access to secrets and other sensitive data can be securely stored and managed, tightly controlled (restricted), and auditable.

items.name: Open Key Chain Manager
items.description: OpenKCM serves as a central management layer for encryption of data at-rest. It comes with built-in multi-tenancy support and allows each tenant to stay in control of designing keychains and managing their lifecycle.
